name: Ernexa Therapeutics Inc.
business: Ernexa Therapeutics Inc. is a preclinical-stage synthetic allogeneic iMSC therapy company developing off-the-shelf cell therapies for cancer and autoimmune diseases. Its lead candidate ERNA-101 targets platinum-resistant ovarian cancer, and ERNA-201 targets autoimmune disorders such as rheumatoid arthritis.

exposures.sentence: We are a preclinical-stage synthetic allogeneic iMSC therapy company.

catalysts.event: Completion of IND-enabling studies and IND submission
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the Investigational New Drug (IND) enabling studies and IND submission in 2026 and to subsequently enter a Phase I investigator sponsored clinical trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Entry into Phase 1 clinical trial for ERNA-101
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the Investigational New Drug (IND) enabling studies and IND submission in 2026 and to subsequently enter a Phase I investigator sponsored clinical trial in the second half of 2026.
